sections.title: Wildlife
text: The Gordano Model Flying Club is located on 12 acers of reclaimed land that was left for nature to take over.
The flying field takes up approximately 2/3 of the available land, there is still a lot of land for a thriving wildlife environment.

sections.title: Bees
text: Making good use of wildlife, there is a active hive of Bees on the site.
